content: Self-Refine's task-agnostic iterative self-feedback loop can be reframed as a base scaffold for building multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each Self-Refine iteration draws on a distinct inconsistent solving perspective to generate more critical self-feedback than single-perspective self-review. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervision while resolving the common failure mode of single-perspective self-reflection: repeating the same blind spot across iterations.
